headline: Product-focused Frontend Engineer
summary: Product-focused Frontend Engineer with 5+ years of experience building modern web applications and high-performing marketing websites. Specializes in React, Next.js, and TypeScript with a strong UI/UX design background. Experienced in leading frontend architecture, designing scalable component systems, and delivering conversion-focused user experiences. Proven track record of building 80+ websites and improving SEO, performance, and accessibility to near-perfect scores.

experience.title: Frontend Team Lead / UI/UX Engineer
bullets: Led frontend development and UI/UX design for a multi-platform web application from concept through multiple product iterations
Managed and mentored a team of 4 developers/designers, guiding architecture and implementation decisions
Designed and built scalable frontend architecture using React, Next.js, and TypeScript
Created and maintained reusable component libraries to ensure consistency and development speed
Owned full UI/UX redesign of both customer-facing application and internal admin portal
Collaborated directly with leadership to define product direction, features, and user experience
Built responsive, high-performance interfaces optimized for usability and accessibility
Implemented modern frontend best practices including modular architecture and performance optimization

experience.title: Freelance Web Developer & UI/UX Designer
bullets: Designed and developed 80+ websites including business sites, landing pages, funnels, and custom web applications
Achieved top Google search rankings for multiple client websites through advanced SEO strategies
Consistently delivered high-performance websites (Lighthouse scores up to 95+ performance, 100 SEO/accessibility)
Built full-stack applications using React, Next.js, Node.js, and SQL databases
Integrated Stripe payment systems and custom authentication solutions
Improved client conversion rates through UX-focused design and optimized user flows
Worked directly with clients to define requirements, design solutions, and execute marketing strategies

experience.title: Digital Marketing & Web Developer
bullets: Built websites and marketing funnels using WordPress, GoHighLevel, and ClickFunnels
Managed client relationships and executed digital marketing campaigns
Developed skills in conversion optimization, analytics, and creative design
